examples: Generally all soldiers are better equipped and more soldiery and therefore more dangerous.
Monsieur Defarge alighted; knowing one or two of the soldiery there, and one of the police.
I see also the dull, drilled, docile, brutish masses of the hun soldiery plodding on like swarm of crawling locusts.
Following looting by the soldiery came looting by the mob.
